during the rebuttal section of a formal debate which team speaks first During the rebuttal section of a formal debate, the opposition team speaks first, providing their counterarguments and challenging the points made by the initial presenting team. This structure ensures that opposing viewpoints are directly addressed early in the rebuttal phase.
